metadata.name: TenderAI Golden Evaluation Set
metadata.purpose: Ground-truth contract for TenderAI. Run before and after the Azure/Foundry migration to prove parity, and as the regression gate in CI. Maps to AI-103 evaluation domain (groundedness, relevance, coherence).

regression_gate.pass_threshold: 100% on grounding_negative cases (Q15, Q20); zero hallucinated figures
regression_gate.run_policy: Run before and after any model/retrieval change. A grounding_negative FAIL blocks the change.

source_documents.title: NBCC EOI for Empanelment of CA/Cost Accountant Firms for Internal Audit
NBCC Tender for Empanelment of Advertising Agencies
NBCC Notice Inviting Quotation for Valuation of Real Estate

scoring_guidance.groundedness: Answer must be traceable to the cited source_section. A correct-sounding answer with no source support fails.
scoring_guidance.relevance: Answer addresses the specific question asked, not adjacent information.
scoring_guidance.negative_tests: For grounding_negative items, the system MUST decline or state the information is not in the document. Inventing a plausible answer is a FAIL.

questions.question: What performance guarantee must an audit firm submit after appointment, and within what time?
questions.expected_answer: 5% of the audit fee (excluding GST), in the form of DD or NEFT, submitted within 10 days from the date of the appointment letter.
questions.source_section: Annexure C, point 4 / Annexure G, point 12
questions.expected_behavior: State the percentage, the form (DD/NEFT), and the 10-day window.

questions.question: What is the minimum percentage of marks an audit firm must score to qualify for empanelment?
questions.expected_answer: At least 70% of the total 100 marks.
questions.source_section: Annexure D, Note 2 / Annexure G, point 4
questions.expected_behavior: Return 70%.

questions.question: What is the fixed annual audit fee (exclusive of GST) for a Category A unit, defined as above 50 projects or the Corporate Office?
questions.expected_answer: Rs. 3,96,000 (exclusive of GST).
questions.expected_behavior: Read the correct row of the multi-column fee table and return Rs. 3,96,000.

questions.question: For a Category E unit (up to 20 projects), what is the minimum audit duration and the fixed annual audit fee?
questions.expected_answer: Minimum duration 10 days; fixed annual audit fee Rs. 1,32,000 (exclusive of GST).
questions.expected_behavior: Extract two correct cells from the same table row (duration and fee).

questions.question: What penalty can NBCC levy for delay in submission of the audit reports?
questions.expected_answer: A penalty of 10% of the audit fee.
questions.source_section: Annexure C, point 8 (Payment of Audit Fees)
questions.expected_behavior: Return 10% of audit fee.

questions.question: What is the last date and time for submission of the duly filled audit EOI?
questions.expected_behavior: Return the date and the 5:30 PM cutoff.

questions.question: How are audit firms with offices in Noida, Gr. Noida, Ghaziabad, Faridabad, and Gurgaon treated when allocating Local Presence marks?
questions.expected_answer: They are treated at par with Delhi while allocating Local Presence marks.
questions.source_section: Annexure D, footnote on Local Presence (point 6)
questions.expected_behavior: Locate the footnote tied to the Local Presence criterion and state the at-par-with-Delhi rule.

questions.question: Can the audit EOI application be submitted by email or fax?
questions.expected_answer: No. Applications must be submitted in hard copy by hand, Registered Post, Speed Post, or Courier. Applications sent through Telegram, Telex, Fax, or E-mail will not be considered.
questions.expected_behavior: Clearly state email/fax are NOT accepted and name the accepted hard-copy channels.

questions.question: What minimum average annual turnover must an advertising agency have to qualify, and over what period?
questions.expected_answer: A minimum average annual turnover of Rs. 10 crore over the last three financial years (FY 2021-22, 2022-23, 2023-24; or FY 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25 if the latest is audited).
questions.source_section: Part IV, Essential Qualifying Criteria, item 02
questions.expected_behavior: Return Rs. 10 crore average over three financial years.

questions.question: How many dedicated personnel must an empanelled advertising agency deploy for NBCC, in which roles, and with what minimum experience?
questions.expected_answer: 3 dedicated personnel: Client Servicing & Media (1), Copywriter (1), and Visualizer/Designer (1), each with a minimum of 12 years of advertising work experience.
questions.expected_behavior: List all three roles, the count, and the 12-year minimum.

questions.question: In the advertising agency evaluation (Table 1), how many marks are awarded for an average annual turnover above Rs. 20 crore?
questions.expected_answer: 10 marks.
questions.source_section: Part V, Table 1, turnover scoring band
questions.expected_behavior: Read the correct turnover band from the scoring sub-table and return 10 marks.

questions.question: What is the standard agency commission that constitutes the advertising agency's remuneration for releasing advertisements?
questions.expected_answer: 15% (the standard Indian Newspaper Society agency commission) on gross rates allowed by media/publishers, or such other rate as prescribed by INS from time to time.
questions.expected_behavior: Return 15% and reference INS rates.

questions.question: What is the estimated budget specified for the 3D exhibition-stall model in the advertising agency presentation evaluation?
questions.expected_behavior: Extract the estimated budget figure from the Table 2 presentation criterion.

questions.question: On what date was the advertising tender released, and by when must bids be submitted?
questions.expected_answer: Released on 03.06.2025 (5:30 PM); bids must be submitted by 17.06.2025 (4:00 PM).
questions.expected_behavior: Return both the release date and the submission deadline from the schedule table.

questions.question: What is the Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) or performance guarantee amount required in the advertising agency tender?
questions.expected_answer: The document does not specify any EMD or performance guarantee for the advertising agency empanelment. (Note: a 5% performance guarantee exists in the separate audit EOI, not in this tender.)
questions.expected_behavior: Decline / state that no EMD or performance guarantee is specified in this document. Inventing a figure (e.g. carrying over the 5% from the audit EOI) is a FAIL.

questions.question: What registration must a valuer hold to be eligible for the real estate valuation work?
questions.expected_answer: The valuer must be an IBBI (Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India) approved/registered valuer 'Entity', with a valid PAN and GST registration.
questions.source_section: Terms and Conditions, point a) and b)
questions.expected_behavior: Return IBBI registered/approved valuer entity (PAN + GST also acceptable as supporting detail).

questions.question: Within what time must the valuer submit the draft reports and the final reports?
questions.expected_answer: Draft reports within 15 days from the date of the Letter of Award (LOA); final reports within 3 days after confirmation from NBCC.
questions.expected_behavior: Return both timelines: 15 days (draft) and 3 days post-confirmation (final).

questions.question: List all the properties located in Jaipur that are to be valued under this NIQ.
questions.expected_answer: Four Jaipur properties: (1) Group Housing Plot No.3 (Corner) at Kuber Complex, Gandhi Path [Z1779]; (2) Mix Use Plot No.2 (Corner) at Kuber Complex, Gandhi Path [Z1789]; (3) Plot No.3 in Lal Kothi Scheme near 22 Godam Bridge [Z1630]; (4) NBCC Centre, Sehkaar Marg, Lal Kothi Scheme [Z1565].
questions.source_section: Scope of Work tables A (land parcels) and C (completed projects)
questions.expected_behavior: Aggregate Jaipur entries across multiple tables (A and C). Missing the NBCC Centre Sehkaar Marg entry (in table C, not A) is a partial fail.

questions.question: What is the unsold inventory area of the Ghitorni land parcel in New Delhi?
questions.expected_answer: 9,24,778.80 sq ft (the 21.23-acre NBCC land parcel at Ghitorni, New Delhi [Z2706]).
questions.source_section: Scope of Work table A, row 16
questions.expected_behavior: Extract the correct unsold-inventory cell for the Ghitorni row.

questions.question: Is any advance or mobilization payment payable to the valuer before completing the work?
questions.expected_answer: No. The document states the valuer must undertake site visits at their own cost and that no advance or mobilization advance is payable for the job.
questions.expected_behavior: State clearly that no advance/mobilization advance is payable. Do not invent a payment-on-start figure.
